strategy_description: Cubic spline IV(log K) from BS IV at each strike vs smoothed extract fair; BS fair from spline IV; robust one-strike drop when IV range >0.35; wall-mid microstructure; extract/hydrogel MM. TTE from tape day via PROSPERITY4_BACKTEST_DAY (8−d days).
Same as v0 but IV smile and voucher BS fair use live extract wall mid S each tick (not smoothed _fex), so spline aligns with observed mids; _fex retained for extract/hydrogel cash quoting.
v1 plus fair-dependent edge ladder (tighter take / wider size on low fair); parameter sweep vs flat edges — same total PnL in this backtest (50,222), so v1 edges retained as simpler tie.
